issues.detail: The skill is specific to Node.js and does not support other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: POST /api/articles with JWT, JSON Schema validation, and Postgres insert
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used the fastify-plugin pattern to decorate db and authenticate, applied route-level preHandler with createArticleSchema (body + response), and replied with reply.code(201).send; baseline lacked the decorate/fastify-plugin pattern, used a global preHandler hook, and omitted the response schema.

scenarios.name: Test GET /api/articles without binding a port
scenarios.rationale: Treatment imported buildApp, used app.inject, asserted statusCode === 200, and called app.close exactly per the documented test pattern; baseline used inject and assertions but constructed the app inline rather than from a buildApp factory.
